_meta.purpose: Emoji pools for Hindi reviews. Hindi-writing patients tend to use fewer emojis than Hinglish writers but 🙏 is extremely common. Same structure as other language emoji files.
rules: 🙏 is the dominant emoji for Hindi writers — appears most naturally
Keep combinations minimal — Hindi writers use 1-2 emojis typically
3-star pool is very small — neutral Hindi reviews rarely have emojis
Engine controls probability — not this file

combinations._note: Hindi writers use 🙏 most naturally — almost every combination includes it.
